components.desc: Implement argument parsing using Python stdlib argparse to parse `--top` flag (integer, default 5) and handle invalid inputs. Test with mock arguments.
Implement text processing function to lowercase input and split on any non-letter character using regular expressions. Test with various punctuation, numbers, and whitespace.
Implement frequency counter and sorting logic. Sort by count descending, then word ascending for ties. Slice to top N. Test with fixed collections containing duplicate counts.
Implement deterministic JSON formatting function to output standard JSON array of `{"word": str, "count": int}` objects. Test output string is exact.
Integrate components into executable `wordfreq.py` reading from standard input and writing to standard output. Test with shell pipes.
Create a fixed input file, expected JSON output file, and automated test script using jq to compare actual and expected output byte-by-byte.
